---
title: file-header
description: "Require a configured source header."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Require a configured source header. Strider default: no required header.

## Bad

```go
package service // when a copyright header is required
```

## Good

```go
// Copyright Example Corp.
package service
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only file-header`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `note`.
